textByHash.016d5efb85938dc91d1308ad17e170fec1b12951: ...And we haunt the evil right back.
textByHash.05d356a4b2d7b7faa8249d13add8c30f3b1dda89: That we have kid, that we have.
textByHash.2c44aef563b9b9828d0eaac5bc12d8510019b5ba: I judge these grapes to be...
textByHash.2c5731efc8559786c0bf99ba10b85a3e3f558567: It's as he says kid, real warm.
textByHash.37f6a04d07d50a34a8e04be8e2a00446e470d670: They're a fine example of raisins I'll say.
textByHash.5355cc888dc1958269e19a67d2efa96abcf74450: ...Plump and juicy! But not fer long!
textByHash.58ac1eaaa0980aabb074066521fcce681fc3c793: It was no skin off my nose, any time kid.
textByHash.647211fc8b2c4ca394e4b43c1e7109a02af5afd4: It is their destiny. A curse on these grapes!
textByHash.762703cd7adecdb2e67ad1cc6a5a61a1316cd314: Good work with those raisins kid, you've got real moxy. Tell me, do you like games?
textByHash.796eb0fc81bbeb3d61440e81dc33e88f4966aaa8: There you have it, risk indeed.
textByHash.7a136f7035b4a2f12b155a8f4d6325114f5aa77d: Pack yer grapes, then. Let's go.
textByHash.7a8b5b095af0bd8413ef561d593f91d0c72aaf17: Perhaps more things in this world exist without yer knowledge than with it. Did ye consider that?
textByHash.8b93117d1bd5dd79373228f0c58aa44e09e6c7ce: We'd best I suppose. Lay them down and see to their transformation.
textByHash.a707d9beae174cb435819c912c6d8d9438d1ffc8: Raisins? Talk to Glanton, kid. He's your raisin man.
textByHash.ac0a49ef9664407e434d11f5c20d079a5d8318bf: This rock was always here, before man was, even.
textByHash.ba890f8600e5372c37fed933bd642d8eb2eed8c2: That you ain't noticed it speaks to yer purview of the world.
textByHash.eaf26a4611c0e9caf269f8bfec730294cb3da249: What say ye? Come hasten the reckoning of the horrible legions what dwell up there with us sometime?
textByHash.fa4b71f7796931c5df4746853edada6242a835e9: Runelink! Hah! I mean real games, games with a wager. Pride or humiliation. Stakes worth fighting for.
textByHash.fbd5538acfd7af5fafe580eba2edf01b021788a8: Same as you I'd wager, lookin' fer that big ol' bunny.
